_comment: Four Gardens Pilgrimage — Garden Master Wei blessing: 1x cobblemon:leaf_stone (the earned evolution stone; enables Gloom/Weepinbell lines inside cap 38) + 2x cobblemon:super_potion. The 300 CD ride a separate cobbledollars add on the blessing button. One-time by construction: the button is gated not_tag pilgrimage_done and latches the tag.
